metadata.homeTitle: InvestLens | AI Investment News Impact Analysis
metadata.description: Analyze key news for South Korean and U.S. stocks and ETFs, then review portfolio-specific impact direction and scores from 1 to 10.

landing.previewNews3: Industry trends and supply chain changes
landing.featuresTitle: Organize the news that informs investment decisions faster
landing.featuresDescription: InvestLens collects news for the securities you follow and uses article evidence to summarize impact direction, score, and reasoning.
landing.newsDescription: Review the latest articles related to your portfolio in one place.
landing.analysisDescription: Distinguish positive, neutral, and negative direction with a 1–10 impact score for each article.
landing.searchDescription: Quickly find South Korean and U.S. stocks and ETFs by ticker or company name.
landing.marketsTitle: South Korean and U.S. stocks and ETFs in one place
landing.marketsDescription: InvestLens connects watchlists, price trends, and related news using its backend instrument and market data APIs.
landing.marketPoint1: South Korean and U.S. stock search
landing.marketPoint3: Price and volume charts by period
landing.ctaTitle: Start with the securities you follow
landing.ctaDescription: Build a portfolio to receive personalized news and AI impact analysis focused on your holdings.

nav.disclaimer: News analysis is provided for reference only and is not investment advice or a stock price forecast.

auth.heroDescription: See important news and its potential impact on your holdings, all in one place.
auth.point2: AI impact direction and scores from 1 to 10
auth.point3: Fast security search and watchlist management
auth.disclaimer: Analysis results are not investment advice or stock price forecasts.
auth.loginDescription: Sign in to view your personalized news feed.
auth.signupDescription: Get investment news tailored to your portfolio.
auth.passwordHelp: Use 8–72 characters. A combination of letters and numbers is recommended.
auth.duplicateEmail: An account with this email already exists.

dashboard.title: Investment News Dashboard
dashboard.description: Quickly understand key news and market impact for the securities you follow.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Add securities to your watchlist to receive personalized news.

search.title: Search Securities
search.description: Search by ticker or company name and add securities to your portfolio.
search.inputLabel: Search by ticker or security name
search.keyboardHelp: Use ↑↓ to select a result and press Enter to add it.
search.emptyDescription: Check the ticker or try a different security type.
search.addFailed: We couldn't add this security. Check whether it is already in your portfolio.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.description: Manage the securities used to personalize your news.
portfolio.emptyDescription: Add your first security to receive related news and impact analysis.
portfolio.deleteFailed: We couldn't remove this security. Please try again.

instrument.notFoundDescription: This security may have been removed, or the address may be invalid.
instrument.sourceNote: Security information is based on the latest instrument master from the InvestLens backend.
instrument.portfolioDescription: Add this security to view related news impact analysis in your personalized feed.
instrument.portfolioFailed: We couldn't update your portfolio. Please try again shortly.

chart.title: Price Chart
chart.aria: {ticker} {range} price area and volume chart. Current price {price}, change {rate} percent
chart.loadingDescription: Preparing data from the market data server.
chart.errorDescription: The market data server may be responding slowly.
chart.emptyDescription: Market data is unavailable for the selected period.

news.feedDescription: Latest analysis related to your portfolio{count, plural, =0 {} other { · {count} articles}}
news.emptyDescription: Lower the filters or add securities to your portfolio.
news.relatedDescription: Articles from the past 90 days and security impact analysis{count, plural, =0 {} other { · {count} articles}}
news.sentimentFailed: Unable to load the AI overview. You can still view the article list.
news.collectFailedDescription: An external news provider may be responding slowly. Please try again shortly.
news.relatedEmptyDescription: No articles have been collected in the past 90 days. New articles will appear here when available.
news.collectionDescription: The first request may take 1–2 minutes while recent articles are collected.
news.notFoundDescription: It may have been removed, or the address may be invalid.
news.contentEmpty: The full article is unavailable. Please use the original article link.
news.impactEmpty: No related security impact analysis is available yet.
news.defaultDisclaimer: This analysis is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice or a stock price forecast.

sentiment.pendingDescription: Once enough related articles are analyzed, average probabilities for upward, downward, and neutral reactions will appear here.
sentiment.title: AI Reaction Probabilities for Recent Articles
sentiment.summary: Average of {analyzed} AI-analyzed articles out of {related} related articles

impact.title: Score {score}: {description}
impact.label: {direction} · Score {score}
impact.score10: Extremely high and immediate potential impact

status.coldStart: The free server may take up to a minute to wake up.
status.errorDescription: Please try again shortly. If the problem continues, check your network connection.
status.unexpectedDescription: Your work is safe. Reload the page to recover.
status.notFoundDescription: This page may have moved or no longer exists.
